# Study Overview
GraphGen can parse structured markdown into tree-aware components.

## Results
The experiment compares textual evidence, table evidence, and visual evidence.

Table 1. Accuracy across baselines.

  <tr><td>Model</td><td>Accuracy</td></tr>
  <tr><td>Baseline</td><td>72</td></tr>
  <tr><td>GraphGen</td><td>86</td></tr>
</table>
